name: startup-assessment
description: AI-powered startup investment assessment tool. Runs structured due diligence across 10 domains (market, product, business model, GTM, traction, management, financials, risk, capital, legal). Produces scored readiness reports, sensitivity analysis, and investment recommendations with go/no-go determination.

commands.name: initiate
commands.description: Set up workspace folders and import business case documents

commands.name: pre-assess
commands.description: Extract context, build framework, and run pre-assessment analysis

commands.name: assess
commands.description: Run full domain assessment across all active modules

commands.name: sensitivity
commands.description: Run sensitivity analysis on the locked assessment

commands.name: recommend
commands.description: Generate investment recommendations with improvement roadmap or deal terms
